creator: tshadwick@oss-solutions.com
text:
I approve, but I'm confused by one thing - why is the port set to 
i386-only?  I run it on AMD64 with FreeBSD 6.2/AMD64 just fine here.  Am 
I missing something?

ONLY_FOR_ARCHS= i386

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/htop,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/120280 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120280
>
